sections.title: Part 1
sections.description: 会話の内容一致選択 — 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切なものを選びなさい。

questions.prompt: What is the woman's problem?

choices.text: She found a mistake in one source.
She may not finish her article in time.
She does not like her first draft.
She is unfamiliar with the topic.

questions.prompt: What does the man imply?

choices.text: His grades improved this term.
He will study harder in the future.
He has lost interest in going to college.
His homeroom teacher is not supporting him.

questions.prompt: What is the man worried about?

choices.text: His son moving away.
The cost of sports equipment.
How dangerous ice hockey is.
The equipment he forgot to buy.

questions.prompt: What is the man's problem?

choices.text: He cannot get a refund.
The store cannot repair his watch.
The store cannot provide another watch.
He was charged the wrong amount.

questions.prompt: What does the woman say about her vacation?

choices.text: She spent too much time fishing.
There was too much snow.
The weather kept her indoors.
She could not find bikes to rent.

questions.prompt: What is the woman concerned about?

choices.text: The other team members may not listen to her.
Some members of the team may decide to quit.
Her ideas to improve efficiency may not work.
The new manager may make unnecessary changes.

questions.prompt: What is the man's concern?

choices.text: The interviewer did not explain the job well.
The interviewer did not seem impressed by him.
He could not answer some of the questions.
He did not talk about his work experience.

questions.prompt: What will the couple probably do?

choices.text: Ask their neighbor to pay for the damage.
Get some advice from their neighbor.
Install some video surveillance.
Build a more secure flowerbed.

questions.prompt: What does the man ask the woman to do?

choices.text: Send him information about a website.
Book a hotel for him.
Introduce him to her friend in Spain.
Help him pay for his trip.

questions.prompt: What is the man's problem?

choices.text: He missed a deadline.
He does not like his boss.
He made a mistake in his report.
He had a meeting with his boss yesterday.

questions.prompt: What does the man say about the TV show?

choices.text: It made claims that were not true.
It was canceled by the TV network.
It was supported by the government.
It revealed dishonest politicians.

questions.prompt: What does the woman think about taking a gap year?

choices.text: Her parents will support her decision.
It will have a negative impact on her career.
It will help her decide what she wants to do.
Her cousin's advice is not reliable.

sections.title: Part 2
sections.description: 文の内容一致選択 — 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切なものを選びなさい。

questions.prompt: What is one thing we learn about Typhon?

choices.text: He was the father of various monsters.
He was the ruler of the underworld.
He was feared by many gods.
He was the god of battle.

questions.prompt: What did Typhon do?

choices.text: He created a giant volcano.
He stole lightning bolts from Zeus.
He climbed a holy mountain.
He tried to become the ruler of the gods.

questions.prompt: What did researchers discover?

choices.text: Cockatoos can use fruit seeds as tools.
Primates and cockatoos make similar tools.
Cockatoos can use a set of tools to achieve a goal.
Some primates use tools to compete for food.

questions.prompt: What were the cockatoos also capable of?

choices.text: Using different objects to construct a single tool.
Helping humans perform a task using tools.
Using tools to hide food from other animals.
Transporting tools to a specific location.

questions.prompt: What was one problem with early music boxes?

choices.text: Some people thought they were scary.
The handles in their backs often broke.
The songs they played were not well-known.
It was not possible to make large numbers of them.

questions.prompt: What does the speaker suggest about music boxes?

choices.text: They were not as advanced as people think.
They were not marketed very well.
They may have been released too early.
They should have been sold more cheaply.

questions.prompt: What is one thing we learn about Jordan?

choices.text: Its dry climate makes growing wheat difficult.
Its people came from many parts of the world.
It may be the oldest nation in the Middle East.
It may be where bread was first made.

questions.prompt: What was the purpose of the campaign?

choices.text: To promote wheat production in Jordan.
To encourage Western countries to buy Jordanian wheat.
To introduce Western farming methods to Jordan.
To teach Jordanians the benefits of consuming bread.

questions.prompt: What was one early problem with satellite phones?

choices.text: The technology required to develop them was unavailable.
There were difficulties in launching satellites.
Many satellites were damaged while in orbit.
Governments in some countries banned their use.

questions.prompt: What does the speaker say about satellite phones today?

choices.text: They work best in urban areas.
They will soon replace land-based phones.
Their cost makes them impractical.
Their usefulness remains limited.

questions.prompt: How do some fishing boats avoid detection?

choices.text: They navigate without GPS.
They send false data to satellites.
They use special radars.
They turn off identification devices.

questions.prompt: What is one concern about using albatrosses?

choices.text: Other birds could be harmed by albatrosses.
The albatrosses may eat too many fish.
People may try to harm the albatrosses.
The devices on the albatrosses may be damaged.

sections.title: Part 3
sections.description: Real-Life形式の内容一致選択 — 実生活で遭遇する場面での英文を聞き、質問に答えなさい。

questions.promptJa: あなたの息子は4年生で、金曜日に遠足に行く。担任はクライン先生である。保護者会で校長が次のように言う。
questions.prompt: What should your son do first on Friday morning?

choices.text: Get on Bus 1.
Get on Bus 2.
Go to the school gym.
Ride with you to Mt. Oakley.

questions.promptJa: あなたは教育に関する学会に参加している。テストと課題の採点についてもっと学びたいと思っている。次のアナウンスを聞く。
questions.prompt: Whose lecture should you attend?

choices.text: Manal Abad's.
Yukari Hatayama's.
Martin Halpern's.
Antonio Rossi's.

questions.promptJa: あなたが乗っている電車が駅間で停車し、次のアナウンスが流れる。あなたは11時にピックフォードで重要な会議がある。
questions.prompt: What should you do?

choices.text: Take a bus from the next stop.
Take a bus from Filburn.
Stay on the train until Pickford.
Stay on the train until the end of the line.

questions.promptJa: 今日は月曜日である。あなたは地元の歯科医院に電話して検診の予約をする。あなたは平日の午前10時から午後4時まで毎日働いている。受付係が次のように言う。
questions.prompt: Which dentist should you see?

choices.text: Dr. James.
Dr. Manganiello.
Dr. Shah.
Dr. Manilow.

questions.promptJa: あなたは幼い子どもたちと2日間のドライブ旅行に行くので、1泊のホテルを予約する必要がある。友人が次のように言う。
questions.prompt: Where should you spend the night?

choices.text: The Waverton Inn.
The Ridge Motel.
The Mountain View Motel.
Palm Village Suites.
